2026-06-11TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Montréal Port AuthorityAppointment of Tamar Alexanian of Montréal, Quebec, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of two years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Montréal Port Authority
